name: Alaska Airlines Visa Signature Card
perks: Famous Companion Fare from $122 ($99 fare plus taxes and fees) each account anniversary
Free first checked bag for you and up to 6 companions on same reservation
3x miles on eligible Alaska Airlines purchases
70,000 mile bonus after spending $3,000 in first 90 days
10% rewards bonus if you also hold a Bank of America checking or savings account
drawbacks: Alaska Airlines flies primarily in western US and select international routes
Only 1x miles on non-Alaska purchases outside of the airline
Companion Fare requires paying taxes and fees (can vary)
Miles ecosystem less flexible than transferable programs
